title: Glen Hass
compiled_truth: Glen Hass is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-06), Glen Hass sent 106 and received 637 emails, totalling 743 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Harris](people/steven-harris) (69), [Kimberly Watson](people/kimberly-watson) (67), [Robert Kilmer](people/robert-kilmer) (63), [Teb Lokey](people/teb-lokey) (51), [Kay Miller](people/kay-miller) (42).
